chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.D-2284 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 12.09.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General Miss. Shabana Naheed, Assistant Prosecutor General ************** None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Record reflects that since filing of the present petition on 23.12.2024, no sincere efforts have been made by the petitioner to proceed with the matter. It appears that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in pursuing the instant petition. In these circumstances, the present Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
